name: xmocha
description: Open-source AI simulation engine for branching decisions, agent worlds, and replayable futures.

scripts.web:mock: XMOCHA_BRANCH_GENERATOR=mock XMOCHA_WORLD_GENERATOR=fallback XMOCHA_SESSION_STORAGE=file node scripts/run-next.mjs dev
scripts.dev:gemma: XMOCHA_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4 OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local --import tsx src/interfaces/harness/run-sample-session.ts
scripts.dev:gemma:auto: XMOCHA_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4 OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 XMOCHA_AUTOPILOT=1 node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local --import tsx src/interfaces/harness/run-sample-session.ts
scripts.web:gemma: XMOCHA_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4 OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 node scripts/run-next.mjs dev
scripts.eval:core: XMOCHA_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4 OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local --import tsx src/interfaces/evaluation/run-core-evaluation.ts
scripts.eval:smoke: XMOCHA_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4 OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 XMOCHA_EVAL_MODE=smoke node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local --import tsx src/interfaces/evaluation/run-core-evaluation.ts
scripts.eval:gemma: XMOCHA_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4 OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local --import tsx src/interfaces/evaluation/run-core-evaluation.ts
scripts.eval:gemma:smoke: XMOCHA_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4 OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 XMOCHA_EVAL_MODE=smoke node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local --import tsx src/interfaces/evaluation/run-core-evaluation.ts
scripts.gemma:smoke: XMOCHA_MODEL_PROVIDER=gemma GEMMA_RUNTIME=ollama GEMMA_MODEL=gemma4 OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://localhost:11434 node --env-file-if-exists=.env.local --import tsx src/interfaces/evaluation/run-gemma-smoke.ts
